message:
perf: integrate zlib compression for Kitty graphics

- Add libdeflate C sources to build (deflate_compress, zlib_compress, adler32, utils)
- displayRawRGBA now compresses RGBA with zlib before sending (toolbar, hints, cursor)
- displayBase64ImageViaSHM compresses RGBA before writing to SHM (screencast frames)
- Add displayBase64ImageWithFormatCompressed with o=z flag
- Add displayRGBAWithSize for compressed SHM transfers with S=<size>
- Fallback to uncompressed if compression fails
